Audit matrix

Rollover audit checklist

Rollover audit checklists matter when operators need a deterministic sequence for proving that reservation pools stayed eligible across failover, replay, and quota exception events.

The checklist calls out exception triggers, dashboard checks, and the reservation guarantees that auditors expect to see preserved.

It also links each audit step to the regional recovery playbooks used during incident review.

Related quota guides
